name: Cheesy Tomato Basil Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 3 whole boneless, skinless chicken breasts (cut into halves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a 9x13 inch baking dish, melt 3 tablespoons butter in the oven.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the remaining sauce ingredients except chicken. Set aside.
4. Place the chicken halves in the baking dish, turning to coat with butter. Spoon the sauce mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake for 30-40 minutes until the chicken is no longer pink.
6. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, stir together all topping ingredients except cheese.
7. Sprinkle the topping mix and cheese strips over the chicken; return to the oven.
8. Continue baking for 5-10 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender and the bread crumbs are brown.
